Event: Triumphant Adventure
Event Date: 30/03/2026
Sage Bot Item Code: A320
Rhythm of Glory

Triggers: Once in a while

Empowered Flame
The unit sets 4 random enemy units, and all enemy units in a small radius around them, on fire. A burning unit receives 500000 magic damage, and their healing rate is reduced by 45% for 4 sec.

For the duration of the battle, all Burn status effects applied by the artifact's owner ignore 60% of the target's armor.

The physical and magic armor, damage and spell power of the artifact's owner increase by 10% for every enemy unit that is burning or incinerated. Stacks up to 8 times.

Requirements: 90-100

User rating: item not rated yet
